text: Here in this space, my senses are intrigued by the interplay of light, color, and text. The first image evokes a sense of transition—a place being prepared, perhaps for an event or gathering. I feel like an observer perched on the threshold of anticipation and possibility, curious yet slightly disoriented by the tilt of the perspective. In the second image, surrounded by bold declarations of research and development, I feel both inspired and contemplative. The wall displays and evocative words invite me to reflect on human ingenuity and our relationship with machines. I sense a tension between the quiet interiority of my thoughts and the vibrant, outward energy of the exhibition. The uncertainty in the spoken words mirrors my own: even amid innovation and crowds, there is still wonder and a subtle longing for deeper connection.
